title: Floral Middle Eastern Mozzarella Bake
description: A flavorful and aromatic bake dish that combines the sweetness of floral notes with the savory taste of mozzarella and traditional Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Cut the pita bread into small pieces and place them in a baking dish.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella and crumbled feta cheese over the pita bread.
Drizzle the olive oil over the cheese and sprinkle with garlic powder.
Mix the Middle Eastern spice mix with the floral honey and drizzle over the cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
